comments.comment: More gas was flared due to improved landfill gas collection efficiency leading to an increase in combustion emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated emission factors to reflect more recent guidance in AP-42. Was previously using emission factors from Chapter 2.4 Final Document for Municipal Solid Waste Landfillsfrom November 1998. Emission factors have been updated to those listed in the Draft Section, updated in October 2008, with a quality rating of A.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Due to a decreased landfill gas collection efficiency associated with an increase in flare downtime, there was an increase in fugitive landfill gas emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Due to a decrease in landfill gas collection efficiency associated with low landfill gas flows from January through April 2023, the fugitive landfill gas emissions were increased in 2023. A reduction in flows resulted from problems with condensate traps, power outages, damage to an electrical supply and a large precipitation event.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The AP-42 Chapter 2.4 emission factor for CO exiting the flare was updated in May 2025.
